title: How to get unique values (remove duplicates) with a formula
task: Return the distinct values from a column with a formula, dropping duplicates — without the Data > Remove duplicates menu.

libreoffice.note: LibreOffice 25.8 (UNIQUE arrived in 24.8; earlier versions return #NAME?).

explanation: UNIQUE scans the range top-to-bottom and keeps the first occurrence of each value, so duplicates are dropped while original order is preserved. It is a dynamic-array function: type it in one cell and the results spill into the cells below.
